mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, e.name AS masterName FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id
c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND c.begin_date between #{begin} and #{end}
order by c.update_time desc

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.master_id, c.subject, c.create_time, c.update_time, e.name AS master_name FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

select (case when id=1 then 'JavaEE就业163期' when id=4 then '前端就业90期' when id=5 then 'JavaEE就业165期' when id=6 then 'JavaEE就业166期' when id=7 then '大数据就业58期' when id=8 then 'JavaEE就业167期' when id=10 then 'JavaEE就业162期' else '其他' end) pos, count(*) num from clazz group by name order by num;
